title: Diagnose and roll a degraded fleet
scenario: Find a hidden regression, replace a worker under load, and make rollout policy stop a worse candidate.
prerequisites: Pass every chapter in the service phase.
Wait until the cumulative incident fixture and isolated replay checkpoint are published.
outcomes: Reproduce a compound failure spanning the phase's chapter boundaries.
Explain which component owns each invariant and recovery action.
Prove the chapter repairs compose without hidden shared state or authority.
objectives: Observe the compound incident through declared evidence only.
Defend a cross-chapter decision before changing the system.
Prove the integrated repair and curate a transferable recap.

steps.title: Observe
steps.body:
### Observe

Run the cumulative incident only after its deterministic fixture is published: Find a hidden regression, replace a worker under load, and make rollout policy stop a worse candidate.
steps.success_criteria: The published incident can be reproduced and its initial evidence can be preserved without changing the system.

actions.description: Plan the observe activity after this lab's cumulative checkpoint and deterministic incident are published.

hints.prompt: What invariant must the observe step protect, and what evidence would establish it?
Use docs/scale/08-observability.md to locate the relevant boundary and evidence; do not infer or apply a future repair.
Compare the available options against this step's success criteria and record the tradeoff without consulting a reference solution.

steps.title: Explain
steps.body:
### Explain

Map the failure across the phase's chapter boundaries and assign every state, authority, retry, and recovery owner.
steps.success_criteria: The learner names the failing boundary, affected invariant, and evidence that supports the explanation.

actions.description: Plan the explain activity after this lab's cumulative checkpoint and deterministic incident are published.

hints.prompt: What invariant must the explain step protect, and what evidence would establish it?
Use docs/scale/08-observability.md to locate the relevant boundary and evidence; do not infer or apply a future repair.
Compare the available options against this step's success criteria and record the tradeoff without consulting a reference solution.

steps.title: Decide
steps.body:
### Decide

Use safe correlated telemetry to prove stateless replacement and evidence-driven promotion.
steps.success_criteria: A learner-authored decision compares viable options and records the chosen tradeoff without copying a reference solution.

actions.description: Plan the decide activity after this lab's cumulative checkpoint and deterministic incident are published.

hints.prompt: What invariant must the decide step protect, and what evidence would establish it?
Use docs/scale/08-observability.md to locate the relevant boundary and evidence; do not infer or apply a future repair.
Compare the available options against this step's success criteria and record the tradeoff without consulting a reference solution.

steps.title: Repair
steps.body:
### Repair

This step remains unavailable until the cumulative checkpoint and deterministic grader are published.
steps.success_criteria: The planned repair scope is bounded to this chapter and remains unavailable until the checkpoint and red instrument are published.

steps.title: Prove
steps.body:
### Prove

Run the cumulative grader, exercise replacement or rollback, and select redacted evidence for the phase recap.
steps.success_criteria: The planned deterministic and realistic-path proof is named without publishing a grader or executable command.

actions.description: Plan the prove activity after this lab's cumulative checkpoint and deterministic incident are published.

hints.prompt: What invariant must the prove step protect, and what evidence would establish it?
Use docs/scale/08-observability.md to locate the relevant boundary and evidence; do not infer or apply a future repair.
Compare the available options against this step's success criteria and record the tradeoff without consulting a reference solution.

completion.planned_proof: After publication, prove Diagnose and roll a degraded fleet phase incident with its deterministic incident plus a realistic replay in an isolated worktree.
planned_decision_artifacts: A learner-authored Diagnose and roll a degraded fleet phase incident decision record that compares viable approaches and preserves earlier invariants.
